nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You must be the young hero everyone's been talking about. I am Guo Jing, defender of Xiangyang. I see you have a righteous spirit - would you like to learn something?

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! I have a skill called 'Ventriloquism Transmission' - it allows silent communication during Go matches, which can confuse your opponent!

options.text: How does this help in Go?

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: In Go matches, you can use this skill to silently transmit your intent, making your opponent unable to predict your next move. It reduces their analysis time by 20%!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: This skill requires reaching level 3 to master. Come back when you're ready!

options.text: I'll work hard to level up!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! You have sufficient foundation. Now I'll teach you 'Ventriloquism Transmission'!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: You've learned 'Ventriloquism Transmission'! Use it well. When you reach level 5, I'll teach you more advanced techniques!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! As the saying goes, 'Iron pestle ground into a needle' - with diligent practice, you'll surely succeed!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: I can teach you some military strategy and special Go techniques. But you must have sufficient foundation - at least level 3!

options.text: What other skills do you have?

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Besides 'Ventriloquism Transmission', I also know the 'Eighteen Palms of Subduing Dragons' and strategic techniques for defending cities. But those require higher levels to learn!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Defending the country is everyone's duty. Practice your skills well - one day, you might help defend Xiangyang too!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Feel free to walk around. Xiangyang welcomes all righteous heroes!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: I see you've reached level 5! How about a Go match to test your skills?

options.text: I'd be honored to learn from you, Hero Guo!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Good! Let's begin. I'll use a 7x7 board - don't worry, I'll go easy on you!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: No problem. Come challenge me anytime when you're ready!

nodes.speaker: Guo Jing
nodes.text: Excellent! Your Go skills are remarkable. Here's a secret manual I've treasured - use it well!
